2918.title: feat: power-steering SDK abstraction — auto-select Claude or Copilot SDK

rationale.category: New SDK abstraction layer for multi-launcher support
rationale.risk: Medium - new abstraction but well-isolated, +303/-229 LOC changes
rationale.complexity: Medium - new module but simple delegation pattern
rationale.impact: High - enables Copilot CLI users to use power-steering
rationale.testing: Needs testing - new SDK abstraction requires validation

2916.title: fix: power-steering incorrectly blocks Q&A/PM sessions with dev checks

rationale.category: Fixes false positives during investigation/PM sessions
rationale.risk: Low - removes checks from INVESTIGATION sessions, adds skill check
rationale.complexity: Low - config changes + one new check function
rationale.impact: Medium - improves PM/investigation UX, reduces interruptions
rationale.testing: Needs testing - validate no false positives on PM sessions

2915.title: fix: add OPERATIONS session type to prevent power-steering false positives on PM sessions

rationale.category: New OPERATIONS session type for PM/planning work
rationale.risk: Medium - changes session detection logic, +1038/-35 LOC
rationale.complexity: Medium - new session type + detection keywords + 18 tests
rationale.impact: Medium - fixes false positives, improves classification
